title: nicotiana cavanillesii
intro: Nicotiana cavanillesii, also known as the Spanish tobacco or fragrant tobacco, is a species of flowering plant in the nightshade family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to act as a expectorant, relieving respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. The health benefits of Nicotiana cavanillesii include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve sleep quality, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of Nicotiana cavanillesii can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to alleviate respiratory issues and promote overall well-being.
